rows.label: qev086809_MSG0001
rows.name:
Don't mistake me—I have no desire
to force Rock into anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086809_MSG0002
rows.name:
But life on Mira is harsh, and all
of us are pooling our various skills
to ensure our collective survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086809_MSG0003
rows.name:
If he is going to be a resident
of NLA, I need him to share
in that responsibility.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086809_MSG0004
rows.name:
It appears that Celica went
off to White Woods alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086809_MSG0005
rows.name:
I sincerely thought that combat
was the logical application
for Rock's natural gifts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086809_MSG0006
rows.name:
I didn't intend for that to
force her into rash action...[ST:wait ]
